testcase.name: test_dates_are_valid_and_ordered

failure.message: AssertionError: conferences with invalid/out-of-order dates: ['scraped-wacv25_2', 'scraped-wacv25', 'scraped-icassp25', 'scraped-www23', 'scraped-cvpr23'] assert not ['scraped-wacv25_2', 'scraped-wacv25', 'scraped-icassp25', 'scraped-www23', 'scraped-cvpr23']

testcase.name: test_urls_use_http_scheme

failure.message: AssertionError: conferences with non-http url: ['scraped-AI4science22'] assert not ['scraped-AI4science22']

testcase.failure:
def test_urls_use_http_scheme(): bad = [c["id"] for c in _conferences() if not c.get("url", "").startswith(("http://", "https://"))] > assert not bad, f"conferences with non-http url: {bad}" E AssertionError: conferences with non-http url: ['scraped-AI4science22'] E assert not ['scraped-AI4science22']
qa\unit\test_data_integrity.py:55: AssertionError
